title: YouTube Thumbnail Graphic Designer
brief: We are seeking a creative designer to craft engaging YouTube thumbnail graphics. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and video editing, with a strong portfolio showcasing their work. Responsibilities include designing visually appealing thumbnails that capture viewer attention and align with our brand's aesthetic. If you have a passion for design and a keen eye for detail, we would love to hear from you! Lincoln Square Media is looking for a specialized YouTube Thumbnail Designer who understands that in the world of political media, a thumbnail is more than just a picture—it’s the headline. We need a visual strategist who combines journalism graphics with high-impact design to maximize Click-Through Rate (CTR) and audience engagement. This is a freelance position focusing on our long-form podcasts, deep-dive reporting, and short-form video content. You will be responsible for creating the "packaging" that stops the scroll and compels viewers to click in a highly competitive news environment. ________________________________________ Key Responsibilities • High-Impact Design: Create custom 16:9 thumbnails for long-form political podcasts, endcards and 9:16 assets for Shorts/Reels that stand out on a crowded homepage. • A/B Testing & Optimization: Design multiple variations (2-3 per video) for YouTube’s "Test & Compare" feature to identify which visual cues drive the highest watch-time share. • Journalistic Visuals: Use high-quality photo manipulation, typ
